title: An Act relative to raising the age requirement for entrance to the Boston Police Academy

abstracts.abstract: By Representative Madaro of Boston, a petition (accompanied by bill, House, No. 4093) of Adrian C. Madaro (with the approval of the mayor and city council) for legislation to further regulate the appointment of police officers in the city of Boston, notwithstanding the maximum age requirements.  Public Service.  [Local Approval Received.]

actions.description: Referred to the committee on Public Service
Hearing scheduled for 09/17/2025 from 01:00 PM-05:00 PM in B-2
Hearing rescheduled to 09/17/2025 from 01:00 PM-02:00 PM in B-2                        and Virtual Hearing updated to New End Time
Reporting date extended to Wednesday, March 18, 2026
Bill reported favorably by committee and referred to the committee on House Steering, Policy and Scheduling

related_entities.name: the committee on House Steering, Policy and Scheduling
committee on House Steering, Policy and Scheduling
